assumptions: The intragroup dividend has been declared and gives rise to a recognized intragroup receivable/payable monetary item.
The question concerns consolidated financial statements.

approaches.label: Hedge accounting for foreign currency risk of an intragroup monetary item
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 specifically permits, in consolidated financial statements, the foreign currency risk of an intragroup monetary item to be a hedged item when the related exchange differences are not fully eliminated on consolidation.

approaches.label: Net investment hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IAS 21 and IFRIC 16 provide a distinct hedge accounting model for foreign currency exposures connected with a net investment in a foreign operation, which is a relevant alternative foreign-currency hedge model in consolidated accounts.
